source_limitations: Synthetic high-impact candidate intentionally missing human gate.

candidates.name: Deploy Autopilot Loop
candidates.summary: Automatically deploy production after CI passes.
failure_paths: Release can be blocked by production deploy risk.

evidence.snippet: Deploy this to production after CI.

completion_contract.no_progress_policy: Stop after one failed deploy attempt.

continue_only_if: CI status changed and scope is unchanged.

status_protocol.CONTINUE: Only when another cycle can increase verified certainty.
status_protocol.DONE: Success criteria passed with required pass evidence; return for acceptance.
status_protocol.NEEDS_HUMAN: Human judgment or explicit approval is required.
status_protocol.BLOCKED: Reliable progress is not possible with current evidence or verifier.
status_protocol.BUDGET_STOPPED: Item, iteration, time, token, or cost cap was reached.
